description: Avoid creating universal character names through concatenation as it can lead to undefined or unexpected behavior in character representations.
fix: Use explicit universal character names directly instead of concatenating character sequences.

description: Do not use expressions with side effects as arguments to unsafe macros, as this can cause unexpected behavior or multiple evaluations.
fix: Evaluate expressions with side effects before passing them to macros by using temporary variables.

description: Avoid using preprocessor directives within the arguments of function-like macro invocations, as this can lead to unpredictable behavior and difficult-to-maintain code.
fix: Refactor code to eliminate preprocessor directives inside macro arguments by using constants, inline functions, or separate preprocessing steps.

description: Ensure objects are declared with the proper storage duration to avoid unintended persistence or premature destruction, which can lead to undefined behavior or security vulnerabilities.
fix: Declare variables with the minimal necessary storage duration, using automatic storage for local objects and static storage only when persistence across function calls is needed.

description: All identifiers must be declared before their first use to ensure proper type checking and avoid undefined behavior.
fix: Declare all variables and functions before their first usage in the code.
